title: 菊花賞の後に・秋晴れの下で

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Traineeeeer! Did you see that?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That was the real me—no, the real us!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's been so long since I got to run so freely!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The responsibility of running for you, and the
assurance that you're here for me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Those two feelings lifted me up and made me feel
so light...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I was finally able to show you a really solid run!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That means I'm okay now, right?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Then can I do the reward thing I wanted to do
during the Sumire Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come—on this grand stage, in
front of everyone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Who's a good trainer?! You are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I've finally become the
Umamusume I've always wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for making you wait... And thank you for
being so patient.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so proud of you and how capable you've
become.
choice_data_list:
I should be thanking you for fostering that
strength in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've learned so much together—things that will
make us the best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Super Creek now has what it takes to
race among the seniors in the Grand Prix too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So, what should our next goal be?
choice_data_list: Let's head to Nakayama at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. I'm a little scared, but I want to face this
challenge with you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's take on the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phew. What took ya? Been waitin' forever to see
those skills!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now we've finally got a superstar lineup for the
year-end race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You'll be facin' the best senior racer around, and
the uncrowned Classic champion.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's right...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'm starving...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gah! You're completely off topic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's rivals have their sights set squarely
on her.
